tooltip.resourceful_refinement.plunger: Right-click fluid tanks to empty them
resourceful_refinement.ponder.tag.resour: Components which allow for advanced processing of raw resources through fluids
resourceful_refinement.ponder.fluid_forg: A Mechanical Forge Mould allows you to transform raw fluids and items into refined materials, in a clean efficient manner
Mechanical Forges must have an empty belt or depot below them in order to forge items
Fluids can be pumped in through the top...
...and Rotational Force provided through the sides.
Once its workspace is cleared and it has the correct ingredients, the Forge will slowly process these inputs and produce a new item
The active recipe can be filtered on the back face of the forge
Some recipes require that the Mechanical Forge Mould be placed above a Casting Depot
These recipes produce items at an even more efficient rate
resourceful_refinement.ponder.coating.te: Coating is a process which allows you to coat tools and weapons with a fluid in a Casting Depot, in order to give them additional durability and effects
A tool can only receive 1 coating at a time,
And a coated tool cannot be recast with a different coating until its current one depletes
All coatings prevent tools from reducing their durability when damaged
To coat a tool, place it in a Casting Depot below a Mechanical Forge Mould, and pump in the required fluid
Then provide the necessary ingredient item
When the forge finishes, your tool will have a shiny new coating!
resourceful_refinement.ponder.fluid_siev: Mechanical Sieves allow you to extract useful by-product items from fluids
Fluids must be piped into the top of the sieve...
...And any output fluids extracted from the bottom
Sieves transfer Rotational Force like cogs, and process fluids at a rate proportional to their speed
You can filter the output by using the filter slot on the top face of the sieve
Extracted by-product items can be extracted from the front of the sieve
Sieves can be stacked on top of one another to improve their extraction of by-products
You can stack sieves like this in a tower up to 4 blocks high!
Sieves share kinetic input vertically with each other
By-products are extracted from the front face of the bottom block...
...And filters can be set on the top block
Each additional sieve adds another chance for the by-product item to successfully drop
Once a by-product has been extracted from a fluid-cycle though, you won't receive any additional drops
resourceful_refinement.ponder.refinery_b: The Fluid Refinery is a multiblock structure that allows you to turn resource fluids into refined products which produce more materials
The Fluid Refinery Access Port is the heart of every Fluid Refinery
Once placed, you must begin by constructing the refinery structure around it
First begin by placing 4 empty Blaze Burners on the corners of your refinery base like so:
Then fill in the remaining space with Copper Casings
Next, place a Blender Blade above the centre block...
To construct the top of the refinery, place another Blender Blade on the centre block below
Place Fluid Tanks in the back corners...
...And Item Vaults in the front corners
Then fill in the remaining space with Glass Blocks
To assemble the refinery, right-click the Access Port
Your refinery is now fully functional!
resourceful_refinement.ponder.refinery_c: Processing fluids with the fluid refinery
The Fluid Refinery uses multiple different inputs to produce refined fluids
You can combine fluids, items, and heat together to create valuable blends and alloys
The most rewarding end-products will often require several steps of processing
Ingredients cannot be inserted into a refinery by hand
You can pipe fluids into the back corners of the refinery...
...And transport items in through the item hatches either side at the front of the refinery
Rotational Force can be provided from either the top or bottom of the refinery casing
Some recipes require your refinery to be HEATED
You can right-click any block on the bottom-layer with a fuel item, to heat the refinery for a short duration
Using Blaze Cakes allows you to raise the refinery to SUPERHEATED temperature
You can also automate fuel by transporting it into any of the bottom corner blocks of the refinery
Once a recipe is underway, you can extract the output by attaching pipes to the front face of the Access Port
resourceful_refinement.ponder.refinery_s: The Fluid Refinery won't process fluids faster if you increase the kinetic speed provided to it
Instead, to enhance your output rate, you'll need to build bigger refineries
The Fluid Refinery can be built in a number of different sizes
When constructing your refinery, you can repeat the middle layer vertically up to 5 additional times
Each additional layer increases the speed at which recipes are processed by 33%%
However, the minimum RPM needed to operate the refinery also increases with each layer
Bigger refineries can also store larger amounts of fluid
resourceful_refinement.ponder.geyser_fra: Geysers are naturally generating deposits of high-pressure molten minerals, ideal for extraction and refinement into resources
Each geyser produces a fluid indicated by the texture within its cracks and the minerals around it
Geysers will naturally spawn these fluids above them, at random intervals. This is a slow process.
To improve extraction, a Fracking Pylon can be built atop geysers to automate fluid production.
resourceful_refinement.ponder.fracking_a: To construct a Fracking Pylon, begin by placing a Fracking Pylon Outlet on top of a geyser block
Then, place 2 Brass Casings on top of the outlet
Next, you must build a vertical pole of girders
This pole must be at least 2 blocks high, but no more than 8 blocks tall
Once the girder pole is built, you must surround the top of your pole with a counterweight ring of Industrial Iron
This counterweight ring can consist of a number of layers, but must never be more than half the height of your pole
Finally, place an Andesite Alloy Block on the top of the girder pole
To assemble the Fracking Pylon, right-click the Outlet
You now have a Fracking Pylon assembly, ready to be operated
resourceful_refinement.ponder.fracking_c: To begin exploiting your geyser for resources, you'll need to provide the fracking pylon with kinetic rotation and fluid input
Pylons require a fluid input to be piped into their blue port
The necessary fluid is dependent on the geyser you've built on
Rotational Force must then be provided to the front face of the pylon
Finally, an outlet pipe must be connected to the orange port to carry output fluids away
The rate at which pylons produce fluid is determined by the size of their counterweight
Each additional layer increases production by 25%%
However, this also dramatically raises the minimum RPM needed to operate the pylon
resourceful_refinement.ponder.blender_bl: Blender Blades act like any other Create shaft, transferring rotation between blocks
They're an essential component for building Fluid Refineries
However, they also have a secondary purpose...
Entities caught in a blender blade will rotate with it until they're flung out
The higher the RPM, the stronger the pull
Mobs and players will continuously take damage while being stirred in a blender blade!
resourceful_refinement.ponder.paint_nozz: The Paint Nozzle can be attached to pipes from any direction
Once placed, right-click with a wrench to adjust the flow speed
Right-click on the nozzle itself to open the valve
Fluids being piped into the nozzle will spray out!
Filling a nozzle with paints allows you to paint any colorable blocks
You can paint concrete, glass, terracotta, or wool
Even some mobs can be dyed this way!
resourceful_refinement.ponder.gel_splatt: When a fluid is ejected by a paint nozzle or hosegun, it turns into a gel blob
When gel blobs hit a solid surface, they might create a Gel Splatter!
Gel splatters have different properties according the fluid used to create them
Some are too hot to touch!
Some fluids don't create gel splatters
Water will wash away any gel splatters nearby
Paint will dye nearby colorable blocks
Potions will act as if thrown
Gel blobs collected by drains will turn back into fluids
resourceful_refinement.ponder.hosegun.te: The Hosegun is a versatile tool for spraying paints and gels
To fill it with fluid, place it under a spout, or right-click on a Refill Station
The Hosegun can take kind of fluid!
Hold down right-click to spray gel-blobs in front of you as you move
As you spray, the Hosegun's tanks will slowly deplete
You can empty a Hosegun by right-clicking on a drain
resourceful_refinement.ponder.refill_sta: Refilling containers with the Refill Station
The Fluid Refill station provides a quick method for refilling containers such as buckets, bottles, and hoseguns
You can pump in fluids from the top, bottom, or back face
The Refill Station holds up to a bucket worth of fluid
To retrieve fluid, right-click with a container
You can place a Display Link on refill stations, and display the fluid contents of the station
resourceful_refinement.ponder.binding_re: Refill Stations can be assigned a Tracking ID by right-clicking on the station
Multiple Refill Stations can share an ID
Once assigned an ID, you can crouch-right-click while holding a hosegun to bind the hosegun to the station's ID
Gels created by that hosegun will now carry this Tracking ID
Place a Display Link on the station, and connect it to a display board
It will show a live count of all gel splatters linked to the station's ID
If a redstone signal is applied to a Refill Station...
...Any gel splatters linked to its Tracking ID will be cleaned up!
resourceful_refinement.ponder.gloopy_hos: If you hold a Hosegun on your main hand, and a Glue Pot in your offhand...
...Your Hosegun will turn into a Gloopy Hosegun!
Gloopy Hoseguns turn paints into gel splatters like other fluids
To ungloop a Hosegun, mix it with water in a basin
gui.resourceful_refinement.fluid_refill_: No tracking IDs in this world
message.resourceful_refinement.refill_st: This station has no Tracking ID. Set one first (empty-hand use).
death.attack.molten_gel_damage.player: %1$s was incinerated by %2$s using spicy gel.
